SEARCH
Package com.nib.commons.esql

Class NSqlCursor

java.lang.Object
com.nib.commons.esql.AbstractNSqlCommand
com.nib.commons.esql.NSqlCommand
com.nib.commons.esql.NSqlCursor
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable
public class NSqlCursor extends NSqlCommand
NSqlCursor class extends NSqlCommand and provides methods to open, fetch, and close a cursor.

    • isClosed

      public boolean isClosed() throws SQLException
      Check if the cursor is closed.
      Returns:
      true if the cursor is closed, false otherwise
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a database access error occurs
